title: Cookie Policy

meta.line1: Document about the use of cookies and similar technologies on the TyPlace platform.
meta.line2: The current version is published on this page.

intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies and similar technologies may be used on the TyPlace platform, what they are used for, and how the user can manage such technologies.

section1.title: 1. General Provisions
section1.p1: The TyPlace platform may use cookies, browser local storage, and other similar technologies to ensure the correct operation of the site, remember settings, provide security, and support service functions.
section1.p2: By using the platform, the user understands that certain technical files and similar mechanisms may be necessary for the basic operation of the site and its functions.

section2.title: 2. What technologies may be used
section2.p1: The following categories of cookies and similar technologies may be used on the platform:
section2.l1: strictly necessary — required for the basic operation of the site, authorization, security, and the performance of key functions;
section2.l2: functional — allowing the platform to remember language, currency, interface settings, and other user preferences;
section2.l3: technical — related to the operation of chats, support, orders, the safe transaction mechanism, internal checks, and other internal platform processes;
section2.l4: analytics or measurement technologies — if the platform uses such tools to analyze stability, performance, and improve the service.

section3.title: 3. What this is used for
section3.l1: to log into the account and maintain the user session;
section3.l2: to save the selected language, currency, and certain interface settings;
section3.l3: to ensure the proper operation of chats, support, orders, notifications, and other platform functions;
section3.l4: to provide security, prevent abuse, and perform technical diagnostics;
section3.l5: to improve the stability, convenience, and overall performance of the platform.

section4.title: 4. Third-party services
section4.p1: The platform may use third-party technical, infrastructure, security, analytics, or payment services that, depending on their logic, may use their own cookies or similar technologies.
section4.p2: The use of such technologies by third-party services is governed by their own rules and policies. The platform does not control the content of such external documents.

section5.title: 5. How the user can manage cookies
section5.p1: The user may manage cookies and similar technologies through their browser settings, as well as through other methods that may be available on the platform if such mechanisms are implemented.
section5.p2: Disabling required or technically necessary cookies may lead to limited operation of certain platform functions or make it impossible to use the service correctly.

section6.title: 6. Changes to the policy
section6.p1: The platform may update this Cookie Policy. The current version is published on this page, and continued use of the platform after an update means acceptance of the new version to the extent applicable.

section7.title: 7. Related documents
section7.p1: The use of cookies and similar technologies is connected with the general logic of data processing on the platform.
section7.p2: You can read more about the platform’s approach to data in the document
